pr.title: GatedAttn + ValueResidual + Full QAT + lzma-9 + BigramHash(2048)

output.summary: Lean GPTQLite config disables gated attention/value residual, postpones QAT until warmdown, and trims vocab/features to boost steps and preserve TTT under 10min/16MB.
techniques: Disable GatedAttention/ValueResidual to cut per-step latency
Trigger QAT only in final 15% of warmdown to avoid overhead
Keep 11L/512d core with BIGRAM_VOCAB=1536 to stay within 16MB while maximizing steps
